ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folders to ignore. One folder per line.
ast.target: 要忽略的文件夹。每行一个文件夹。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Deprecation warning: recast.print now returns an object with a .code property. You appear to be treating the object as a string, which might still work but is strongly discouraged.
ast.target: 弃用警告：recast.print 现在返回一个带有 .code 属性的对象。您似乎将该对象当作字符串处理，这可能仍然有效，但强烈不建议这样做。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Starting with v2.0.0-beta.1 date-fns doesn't accept strings as date arguments. Please use `parseISO` to parse strings. See: https://github.com/date-fns/date-fns/blob/master/docs/upgradeGuide.md#string-arguments
ast.target: 从 v2.0.0-beta.1 开始，date-fns 不再接受字符串作为日期参数。请使用 `parseISO` 来解析字符串。详见：https://github.com/date-fns/date-fns/blob/master/docs/upgradeGuide.md#string-arguments

ast.name: message
ast.target: import.meta 只能出现在 'sourceType: \"module\"' 中

ast.name: message
ast.target: 'import' 和 'export' 只能出现在 'sourceType: \"module\"' 中

ast.name: message
ast.source: A binding pattern parameter cannot be optional in an implementation signature.
ast.target: 在实现签名中，绑定模式参数不能是可选的。
